narrative:
Reily Township has 2,078 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
